chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Al-Hakam

text: ه عن عليّ بن الحكم فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن عليّ بن الحكم‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Al-Hakam has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Ali ibn Al-Hakam.
